metadata.title: Suro
metadata.description: A shared corkboard for the people you do life with. Group lists, calendar, files, shared expenses and Secret Santa, all in one calm place.

common.name: Name
common.connectionErrorBody: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

landing.heroTitle: A shared corkboard for the people you do life with
landing.heroSubtitle: Suro keeps your group's lists, plans, files and shared expenses in one calm place, so you can stop juggling chats, spreadsheets and reminders.
landing.featureListsBody: Shopping lists, packing lists, to-dos. Categorize items, save reusable templates, and check things off together in real time.
landing.featureCalendarBody: Plan trips, dinners and birthdays. Link a list to an event so the packing or shopping is right where you need it.
landing.featureFilesBody: Share photos, PDFs and rich-text notes with the whole group. No more digging through chat history.
landing.featureExpensesBody: Track who paid for what, split the bill fairly, and let Suro work out the simplest way to settle up.
landing.featureSecretSantaBody: Run a private gift exchange with custom exclusions and a hidden ideas list only your match can see.
landing.featureNotificationsBody: Get notified when someone updates a list, adds an event, or settles a debt. No chat-app noise.
landing.useCasesTitle: Made for the groups in your life
landing.useCaseFlatmatesBody: Keep the shopping, chores and bills under control, together, not just in one person's head.
landing.useCaseFamilyBody: From weekly meal planning to holiday packing, share what matters with the people at home.
landing.useCaseFriendsBody: Plan the trip, split the costs, and surprise each other with a Secret Santa that actually works.
landing.ctaTitle: Start your first group in under a minute
landing.ctaBody: Sign in with Google or your email. No credit card, no setup. Bring the people you share life with and try it together.
landing.footerTagline: A shared corkboard for the people you do life with.

info.heroTitle: What Suro is today, and what it aims to become
info.heroSubtitle: Suro consolidates the tools small groups already use to coordinate, in one app built for the people, not the workplace.
info.problemTitle: Group life is scattered across tools that were never built for it
info.problemBody: Households, families and friend groups still coordinate across chat threads, shared notes, spreadsheets and a handful of single-purpose apps. The relevant information ends up everywhere and nowhere. Existing tools either target the workplace or solve only one slice, like splitting a bill or keeping a shopping list, and ignore the rest of what a group needs.
info.valueTitle: One app for the practical life of a small group
info.valueBody1: Suro brings together lists, calendar, files, rich-text notes, shared expenses and Secret Santa under a single group. Members see the same content in real time, with offline-aware sync.
info.valueBody2: The product is opinionated about scope. It focuses on the recurring decisions a group makes together, not on chat, social feeds or productivity workflows. The result is a quiet interface that asks for attention only when something actually changes.
info.valueBody3: It ships today as a Progressive Web App with push notifications, offline support, multi-language interface and a serverless backend that keeps operating costs near zero per inactive group.
info.featuresTitle: The same components, with mock data you can poke
info.featuresSubtitle: The four core surfaces of the app, rendered with sample group content. State stays local to your browser.
info.demoListsTitle: Shared lists with categories and reusable templates
info.demoListsBody: Shopping, packing, to-dos. Items can be grouped by category and saved as templates for use across lists. Each group member sees the same state, so the list never lives in one person's head.
info.demoExpensesTitle: Track who paid for what, settle in the fewest transfers
info.demoExpensesBody: Each member's balance updates as expenses are added. A built-in algorithm suggests the simplest settlement instead of asking the group to resolve every pairwise debt.
info.demoCalendarTitle: Events tied to the list they need
info.demoCalendarBody: A trip, a birthday, a dinner. Each event can hold the packing or shopping list, the relevant files and shared notes, so the next step is always one tap away from the date.
info.demoFilesTitle: Documents, photos and shared notes, kept where the group will find them
info.demoFilesBody: Upload photos and PDFs, write rich-text notes, attach them to an event or keep them at the group level. No more digging back through chat history six months later.
info.demoFilesNoteContent:
Cleaning rota

Marta does the kitchen on weeks 1 and 3. Joan does the bathroom on weeks 2 and 4.

Bills

Internet, water and electricity are split four ways at the end of each month.
info.audienceTitle: The small groups that already coordinate every day
info.audienceFlatmatesBody: Shopping rota, shared bills, who paid the deposit, who's home next weekend. Suro keeps it in one place instead of spread across a WhatsApp group.
info.audienceFamiliesBody: Meal planning, holiday packing, school documents, shared calendars between parents. Most households run on two or three apps; Suro replaces them with one.
info.audienceFriendsBody: Trip planning and bill splitting are usually the first reason a group signs up. From there they keep using it for recurring events and shared expenses.
info.diffTitle: How Suro compares to the alternatives groups try first
info.diffIntro: Beyond any single comparison, the deeper difference is how the pieces connect. A list links to a calendar event so the packing sits where the trip is, files attach to the events they belong to, and shared expenses live next to the plans that caused them. Other tools treat these as separate mini-apps. Suro treats them as one connected workspace.
info.diffSplitwiseBody: Splitwise handles expenses only. Once a group needs a packing list, a shared event or a recipe note, they leave the app.
info.diffChatsBody: Chat threads scroll past. Decisions, dates and balances live in messages that are hard to find next month. Suro keeps the state, not the chatter.
info.diffNotionBody: Productivity tools target teams and require structure. Most households will not set up a workspace. Suro is opinionated and usable in under a minute.
info.diffFamilyAppsBody: Family apps cover calendars and chores but leave out expenses, files and friend or flatmate use cases. Suro is one product that fits all three.
info.roadmapBody: The current product is a Progressive Web App with push notifications, offline support and home-screen install. The next stage is native iOS and Android clients to improve discovery in the app stores, take advantage of platform performance, and integrate with system features such as widgets and contacts.
info.privacyTitle: Group data stays inside the group
info.privacyBody: Suro doesn't sell data, doesn't use group content for advertising, and runs no algorithmic feeds. The app only stores what it needs to operate, and any account and its contents can be deleted in full at any time.
info.monetizationTitle: Freemium with a paid family or group plan
info.monetizationPrimaryBody: Small groups stay free. A paid tier opens larger groups, more storage, premium templates, advanced expense tools, priority support and the upcoming native apps. The free tier exists to make adoption frictionless. The paid tier captures groups that already rely on Suro every week.
info.monetizationAltSeasonalBody: Secret Santa offered as a one-off purchase or part of a year-end bundle.
info.monetizationAltB2BBody: Co-living operators, small associations and shared spaces use the same primitives as households. A plan with admin controls fits naturally.
info.monetizationAltSponsoredBody: Brand-provided list templates such as travel checklists, shown opt-in and never injected into a group without consent.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what personal data Suro collects, why we collect it, and what we do with it. Suro is built to keep your group's information private. We don't sell data, and we don't use it for advertising.
privacy.controllerBody: Suro is run by Roger Clotet as a personal project (no company). For any privacy-related question or request, write to <email>suro@clotet.dev</email>.
privacy.dataIntro: We only collect what's needed to run the app:
privacy.dataAccount: Account information: your name, email address, and (if you sign in with Google) your Google profile picture.
privacy.dataContent: Content you create in the app: groups, lists and items, calendar events, notes, files you upload, expenses, Secret Santa entries.
privacy.dataPush: Push subscription: if you enable push notifications, we store a browser-issued subscription so we can send you updates.
privacy.dataTechnical: Technical data: usage events and error reports collected through PostHog (see below). No precise location tracking.
privacy.purposesProvide: Provide the service: store and sync your groups, lists, and shared content with the people you've invited.
privacy.purposesAuth: Sign you in via Google or magic-link email.
privacy.purposesNotify: Send you in-app and push notifications about activity in your groups (only if you opt in).
privacy.purposesImprove: Understand how the app is used and fix bugs, via anonymous analytics.
privacy.purposesLegalBasis: The legal basis is your consent (when you sign up) and our legitimate interest in operating and improving the service.
privacy.processorsIntro: We rely on a small number of trusted providers that process data on our behalf:
privacy.processorNeonBody: Hosts the PostgreSQL database where your account and content live.
privacy.processorGoogleBody: Used only if you sign in with Google. Google handles the OAuth sign-in; we receive your name, email and profile picture from them.
privacy.processorResendBody: Sends magic-link login emails. Receives only the email address you're trying to sign in with.
privacy.processorUploadthingBody: Stores files you upload to your groups (images and PDFs).
privacy.processorPosthogBody: Receives anonymous product-analytics events and error reports to help us improve the app. PostHog also sets a cookie to identify your browser across sessions.
privacy.transfersBody: Some of these providers may process data outside the EU under standard contractual clauses or equivalent safeguards.
privacy.cookiesIntro: Suro uses a small number of cookies and similar storage:
privacy.cookiesAuth: A session cookie set by the authentication system, required for you to stay signed in.
privacy.cookiesPrefs: Cookies storing your interface preferences (language, theme, sidebar state).
privacy.cookiesAnalytics: An analytics cookie set by PostHog to identify your browser across sessions for product analytics. No advertising or cross-site tracking.
privacy.retentionHeading: How long we keep your data
privacy.retentionBody: We keep your data for as long as your account exists. To delete your account and all data linked to it (including any groups you created), write to <email>suro@clotet.dev</email>. Once you ask, we delete everything immediately and keep no copies.
privacy.rightsBody: If you're in the EU, the GDPR gives you the right to access, correct, delete or export your data, and to object to its processing. To exercise any of these rights, write to <email>suro@clotet.dev</email>. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority (in Spain, the AEPD).
privacy.changesBody: If we change this policy, we'll update the effective date at the top. For significant changes we'll let you know in the app or by email.
privacy.contactBody: For any question or request related to this policy, write to <email>suro@clotet.dev</email>.

secretSanta.description: Secret Santa is a draw where each person is randomly assigned another participant, and they prepare a gift for them, so nobody knows who got whom.
secretSanta.infoDescription: This section is intended for groups of 2 or more people, and lets them organize a Secret Santa.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Suro is a shared corkboard for the people you do life with. Let's take a quick tour of what you can do.
onboarding.listsBody: Create shopping lists, to-dos, and packing lists. Categorize items, save reusable templates, and check things off together in real time.
onboarding.calendarBody: Plan trips, dinners and birthdays. Link a list to any event so everything you need is in one place.
onboarding.filesBody: Share photos, PDFs and documents with your group. No more digging through chat history.
onboarding.notesBody: Write and share rich-text notes with your group. Great for meeting notes, travel plans, or recipes.
onboarding.expensesBody: Track who paid for what, split costs fairly, and let Suro work out the simplest way to settle up.
onboarding.profileBody: Add your name and pick an avatar so your group members can recognize you.
